questions.scenario: The group vars file says `orders_api_port: 8080`. A host var for `orders-web-02` says `orders_api_port: 8081`. A play targets `orders-web-02` and does not override the value. Which port should the template use for that host?

options.text: 8081, because the host-specific variable is more specific than the group variable.
8080, because group vars always override host vars.
Both values, because templates render every matching variable.
Neither value, because variables cannot be used in templates.

questions.explanation: More specific host variables override broader group variables when the same name is defined in both places.
